mapper.update:
UPDATE SYS_PARAMETER SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PARAM_CD = #{paramCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARAM_NM = #{paramNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARAM_VAL = #{paramVal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FLAG = #{flag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE SYS_PARAMETER SET PARAM_VAL = #{paramVal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_parameter( ID, PARAM_CD, PARAM_NM, PARAM_VAL, REMARK, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, FLAG )VALUES ( #{id}, #{paramCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramVal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now}, #{flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT ID, PARAM_CD, PARAM_NM, PARAM_VAL, REMARK FROM sys_parameter WHERE PARAM_CD = #{key}

SELECT ID, PARAM_CD, PARAM_NM, PARAM_VAL, REMARK, FLAG FROM sys_parameter
id = #{id}
